description_long: This handbag features a structured, rectangular body with a distinctive combination of materials: the main surfaces are covered in smooth, matte black leather, while the two side panels are made of a light brown wood with a natural grain pattern. The bag is equipped with two adjustable black leather straps attached to the top with metal hardware, allowing it to be worn as a backpack or carried by hand. The front flap is asymmetrical and closes over the main compartment, likely secured by a hidden magnetic snap or similar mechanism. The metal chain and hardware add a subtle decorative touch, enhancing the bag's modern, urban aesthetic. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible logos, patterns, or additional embellishments.
description: A structured handbag with matte black leather surfaces, wooden side panels, and adjustable black leather straps with metal hardware. The design is minimalist and modern, featuring an asymmetrical front flap.
description_view_0: The left side of the handbag is visible, showcasing the light brown wooden panel and the black leather body, with the straps and metal hardware partially visible.
description_view_1: The back of the handbag is shown, highlighting the two adjustable black leather straps and the smooth, unadorned black leather surface.
description_view_2: The right side of the handbag is visible, again displaying the wooden panel and the attachment points of the straps and hardware.
description_view_3: The front of the handbag is shown, featuring the asymmetrical black leather flap that covers the main compartment, with no visible logos or decorations.
attribute_strap_type: Two adjustable black leather shoulder straps, attached with metal hardware for backpack-style carrying.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Asymmetrical front flap, likely secured with a hidden magnetic snap underneath the flap.
attribute_decorative_elements: Metal chain and hardware; no other visible decorative elements.
